channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Claudia Cardinale Captured by Graziano Arici in 1958 Portraits
item.description: In 1958, Italian Tunisian actress Claudia Cardinale, then 19 years old, was photographed by Graziano Arici in a series of portraits that highlighted her youthful elegance and emerging stardom. Having ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates on Verge of Ending Sundowns’ Eight-Year League Dominance
item.description: South African football supporters may witness the end of an era as Mamelodi Sundowns' eight-year hold on the domestic league appears to be coming to a close. Following Sundowns' 3-2 defeat to TS Galax...

item.title: Vice President Vance Comments on Trump's Iran War Statements Amid Nuclear Concerns
item.description: During a May 13, 2026 press conference, U.S. Vice President JD Vance addressed reporters' questions about President Donald Trump's remarks on the financial impact of the ongoing war in Iran. A reporte...

item.title: Notion Launches Developer Platform to Integrate AI Agents and Workflows
item.description: Notion, the productivity software known for its collaborative note-taking app, is expanding into AI-driven automation with the launch of its Developer Platform. The new platform enhances Notion's exis...

item.title: Canada Considers Cities to Host New International Defence Security and Resilience Bank
item.description: The Canadian government is preparing to host the headquarters of a new international financial institution, the Defence Security and Resilience Bank (DSRB), which aims to provide low-interest loans to...

item.title: Fashion Highlights from the 2026 Cannes Film Festival Red Carpet
item.description: The 2026 Cannes Film Festival showcased not only cinematic brilliance but also a spectacular display of fashion, making the red carpet a hot topic for style enthusiasts worldwide. Attendees brought a ...

item.title: How Rising Gas Prices Are Impacting Low-Income Residents in Pennsylvania
item.description: Rising gas prices in Pennsylvania are disproportionately affecting low-income and rural residents, who often face tough choices between fueling their vehicles and meeting other essential needs, like g...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh Tigers Face Rising Threats Outside Protected Areas
item.description: Madhya Pradesh has reported 32 tiger deaths in the first five months of 2026, raising serious concerns about the safety of the big cats beyond protected reserves. Officials say that while poaching has...

item.title: Federal Judge Rules Trump Administration's Immigration Detention Policy Illegal
item.description: A federal appeals court in New York has struck down a key Trump administration immigration policy, ruling that detaining suspected illegal immigrants without bond is unlawful. Judge Joseph F. Bianco, ...

item.title: Trump’s China Visit Amid US-Israel Conflict with Iran Alters Middle East Alliances
item.description: The ongoing US-Israel military operations against Iran have overshadowed President Donald Trump’s recent visit to China, highlighting growing tensions and realignments in the Middle East. Trump arrive...

item.title: Genevieve Nnaji returns to TV with role in BBC's Wahala series
item.description: Nigerian film superstar, Genevieve Nnaji, don return to television after many years as she don join BBC drama series, Wahala. This na her first TV role since she dey act as small pikin for Ripples soa...

item.title: Jack White criticises the golden statue of Donald Trump in Florida
item.description: Jack White has expressed criticism over the 22-foot golden statue of former US President Donald Trump unveiled at Trump National Doral in Florida. The statue, depicting Trump with a raised fist remini...

item.title: Xi and Trump Meet in Beijing to Discuss China-US Cooperation and Trade
item.description: China’s President Xi Jinping welcomed US President Donald Trump in Beijing for a significant two-day summit, emphasising the need for the two countries to be 'partners and not rivals.' The meeting sta...

item.title: Trump and Xi Begin Key Bilateral Talks in Beijing Amid Calls for Cooperation
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has commenced a significant summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing, signalling potential shifts in US-China relations. The meeting began with a formal handshak...

item.title: Minister Malatsi Highlights Need for Meaningful Digital Access in South Africa
item.description: Communications and Digital Technologies Minister Solly Malatsi emphasised in Parliament that while South Africa has made significant progress in connecting its citizens to the internet, simply providi...

item.title: Iran Hosts Ceremony to Send National Football Team to 2026 World Cup
item.description: Iran don hold big send-off ceremony for their national football team as dem dey prepare for 2026 World Cup wey go take place for United States, Mexico, and Canada. People gather for central Tehran squ...

item.title: Mother sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering her husband with fentanyl
item.description: Kouri Richins, a 36-year-old mother from the United States, has been sentenced to life in prison without parole after being found guilty of murdering her husband, Eric Richins, in 2022. The case gaine...

item.title: Cardoso confident Sundowns can bounce back for CAF Champions League final after Premiership loss
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns endured a disappointing finish to their domestic campaign after a 3-2 defeat to TS Galaxy, which handed Orlando Pirates a potential edge to claim the Betway Premiership title. Despit...

item.title: Tanzania vehicle imports surge as demand for fuel-efficient cars rises
item.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Tanzania saw a big jump in spending on imported vehicles, reaching Sh352.84 billion, up 53.9% from the same period in 2025. Consumers are now preferring small, fuel-effic...

item.title: Key Developments in Nebraska Democratic Primaries Highlight Strategic Moves
